results.description:
Once, the passion between fallen angel Silas and Lucifer's vicious handmaid, Ursula, burned hotter than hell. Until he destroyed it all.

Now they're together again, unwilling teammates in a brutal tournament that will push them to their mental and physical limits; exposing all the fury and hurt Ursula has tried so hard to hide - and a scorching desire that cannot be denied. 

But to survive the deadly trials ahead of them, Silas and Ursula must learn to trust each other again...or lose so much more than they realize...

Fallen's Rebellion is a standalone novel in the Knights of Hell Series!
